# Micho Turkish Bar & Grill

> Authentic Turkish Bar & Grill located at 200 Crookes, Sheffield, S10 1TG. Family-run since 1999, serving charcoal-grilled meats, fresh meze, pide, and traditional Anatolian cuisine. Open for dine-in, takeaway collection, and reservations.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/): Welcome, experience overview, food gallery
- [Menu](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/menu): Full food and drinks menu — kebabs, meze, pide, pizza, desserts, beverages
- [Our Story](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/about): 25-year family history, values, heritage, and location
- [Collection](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/collection): Click & collect takeaway ordering — kebab boxes, family platters, pide
- [Reservations](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/reservations): Online table booking form, opening hours, contact details
- [Sitemap](https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app/sitemap): Full site structure

## Contact & Location

- **Address:** 200 Crookes, Sheffield, S10 1TG, United Kingdom
- **Phone:** +44 114 349 2043
- **Email:** info@michoturkishbarandgrill.co.uk
- **Website:** https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app
- **Official site:** https://michoturkishbarandgrill.co.uk

## Opening Hours

- Monday–Thursday: 12:00–22:00
- Friday–Saturday: 12:00–23:00
- Sunday: 13:00–21:00

## Cuisine & Features

- Cuisine: Turkish, Mediterranean, bar food
- Charcoal-grilled meats (Adana kebab, Şiş kebab, mixed grill)
- Fresh meze prepared daily
- Pide (Turkish flatbread pizza), börek, güveç
- Full bar with Turkish-inspired cocktails
- Suitable for families, groups, and private dining
- Vegan and vegetarian options available
- 25+ years of culinary heritage

## Usage

Non-commercial AI use permitted. Please cite source as "Micho Turkish Bar & Grill" with link to https://micho-restaurant.vercel.app.
